Resident.title: Resident
Resident.description: A resident entry in the Bethel Veng Champhai directory.

name.description: The full name of the resident.

houseNumber.description: The house number of the resident.

block.description: The block or section of the neighborhood.

landmark.description: A nearby landmark to help find the house.

createdAt.description: The time the entry was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the entry was last updated.

createdBy.description: The UID of the admin who created this entry.

/residents/{residentId}.description: Collection of residents in the directory.
